MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SAMUEL ALTMAN, GREGORY BROCKMAN, OPENAI, INC., OPENAI, LP, OPENAI, LLC, OPENAI GP, LLC, OPENAI OPCO, LLC, OPENAI GLOBAL LLC, OAI CORPORATION, LLC, OPENAI HOLDINGS LLC's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. On April 18, 2024, the court granted the application for complex designation. Please re-calendar the motion before Judge Schulman in department 304.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SAMUEL ALTMAN, GREGORY BROCKMAN, OPENAI, INC., OPENAI, LP, OPENAI, LLC, OPENAI GP, LLC, OPENAI OPCO, LLC, OPENAI GLOBAL LLC, OAI CORPORATION, LLC, OPENAI HOLDINGS LLC's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.
